title: Mason's Hammer

idea.mutation_of: Topiary Master (subtractive sculpting) + r/WebGames Tetherline + Slingshot Scrap shipped game (inverted: shape stone, not throw it)
idea.why_novel: Propagation-based puzzle isn't on portals. Players plan strikes whose effects fork beyond the click point.

lose_condition: Crack enters a forbidden vein, or strikes exhausted with chunk not fully separated
